meaning: 曲霉病(由曲霉属真菌引起的传染病,多见于鸟类,较少发生于人)
examples: Pulmonary aspergillosis is a spectrum of lung diseases caused by fungus aspergillus.
Lack of enhancement may suggest the diagnosis of aspergillosis, since most brain tumors enhance.
Objective: To improve the diagnosis and treatment level of sinus aspergillosis under endoscopic sinus surgery.
